title: Skyblock Collection
description: A modpack made by seazyns for 1.21.11 Hypixel Skyblock.
body:
**A Hypixel Skyblock modpack made by seazyns!**

This modpack contains many mods with solvers / helpers / qol features for Hypixel Skyblock such as:
- Enchantment Table Solver
- Numerous Profit Trackers
- Enderchest / Backpack GUI
- NEI Menu for Items & Recipes
- GUI to view all Items in Ender Chests / Backpacks / Island Chests / Sacks etc.
- Garden QOL
- Rift QOL
- Fishing & Mining QOL
- etc.
